title: Rhythm Raccoon
short_description: Ringo the raccoon taps out a beat — watch, listen, then repeat it back. Each round adds one more note!
description: Ringo the raccoon found a set of shiny drums in the bins and started a band! Watch and listen as he taps out a beat on four coloured drum pads, then repeat it back by tapping the same pads in the same order. Every round adds one more note, so the rhythm grows longer and longer — a musical memory challenge that trains listening, sequencing and a sense of beat, with pleasant pentatonic tones so every pattern sounds like real music. Younger players get a slow, steady tempo; older players take on fast and funky beats. A free online rhythm, listening and musical-memory game for kids in grades 1–5, with longer rhythms and streaks feeding your score and GP.
controls: Watch and listen, then tap the drum pads back in the same order. Sound on!
